span.p:
Shared Infrastructure
PostgreSQL (user data)
Redis (session)
Kafka (events)

span.p:
Observability Stack
Metrics (Prometheus)
Tracing (Jaeger)
Logging (ELK)
Alerting (PagerDuty)
